generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent‑magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot."
]

instance GearwheelGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel gearbox attached to the motor shaft on the first axis."
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox following the gearwheel gearbox on the first axis."
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor measuring I_M on the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentTelemetry
]

instance MotorShaftEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Dual position encoder measuring rotor position on the motor shaft."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorShaftPositionTelemetry
]

instance GearboxOutputEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Dual position encoder measuring output position after the cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxOutputPositionTelemetry
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction
instance CurrentTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorShaftPositionTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorShaftEncoder
]

instance GearboxOutputPositionTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxOutputEncoder
]

instance TelemetryProcessingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python‑based processing component that consumes MQTT telemetry to compute torque and angular velocity."
]

instance TorqueTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TelemetryProcessingComponent
]

instance AngularVelocityTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TelemetryProcessingComponent
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance StructuralSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Engineering structural model of the first axis described in SysML."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance MotorSimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink executable model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance GearwheelSimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model of the gearwheel gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance GearboxSimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model of the cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb‑Viscous friction model used in the motor simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model used in the motor simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model used in the motor simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model used in the motor simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance DataCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Python data‑calculation model computing torque and angular velocity from raw telemetry."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonProcessingLibrary
]

instance CurrentDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Trace of the motor current I_M recorded via MQTT telemetry."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool, PythonProcessingLibrary
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentTelemetry
]

instance RawCurrentDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw current sensor data stream received from the MQTT broker."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentTelemetry
]

instance TorqueDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Trace of the computed motor torque over time."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool, PythonProcessingLibrary
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueTelemetry
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Trace of the computed motor angular velocity over time."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool, PythonProcessingLibrary
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityTelemetry
]

instance RawPositionDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw position sensor data streams from motor shaft and gearbox output."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorShaftPositionTelemetry, GearboxOutputPositionTelemetry
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML used for structural description of the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAnalysisService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink used for executable simulation of motor, gearboxes, and friction models."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DataAnalysisService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker facilitating continuous high‑frequency telemetry of current and position signals."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DiagnosticsService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell used for data integration of the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAnalysisService
]

instance PythonProcessingLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python library for real‑time data processing and friction parameter updates."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DiagnosticsService
]

instance MBSE_RFLPTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MBSE RFLP methodology tool applied during model refinement."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAnalysisService
]

instance MBSE_SMArDTTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MBSE SMArDT methodology tool applied during model refinement."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAnalysisService
]

instance DashboardFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard technology used for visualizing data traces and providing operator feedback."
    DTDFVocab:enables OperatorFeedbackService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time friction identification by comparing measured and simulated motor behavior."
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdatedFrictionParametersInsight, UpdateControlAlgorithmAction
]

instance DiagnosticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Diagnostics service detecting wear and suggesting motion profile adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:provides WearDetectionInsight, MotionProfileAdjustmentInsight, UpdateMotionProfileAction
]

instance OperatorFeedbackService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service delivering operator feedback through the unified dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperatorFeedbackInsight, AlertOperatorAction
]

instance DataAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing comparative data analysis between measured and simulated behavior."
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdatedFrictionParametersInsight, WearDetectionInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance UpdatedFrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated friction parameters identified by the real‑time friction identification service."
]

instance WearDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Wear detection diagnostic derived from sensor data and simulation comparison."
]

instance MotionProfileAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Suggested motion profile adjustments to mitigate wear and improve machining accuracy."
]

instance OperatorFeedbackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Feedback provided to operators through the dashboard based on real‑time diagnostics."
]

instance UpdateControlAlgorithmAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update action for the control algorithm using new friction parameters."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance UpdateMotionProfileAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic action to adjust the motion profile based on wear diagnostics."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AlertOperatorAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Alert action sending notifications to operators via the dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// Environment and Component instances
instance MABI_MAX100Robot : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Serial industrial robot MABI MAX 100."
]

instance FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot."
]

instance FirstAxisDigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin representing the first axis, containing data traces, simulation models, and asset definition."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time, continuous operation; sensor data is streamed in real time, and simulation models are executed synchronously to match the data rate, enabling immediate feedback and model update."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated architecture where the asset (robot), its engineering model, processing component, simulation models, and sensor data streams are integrated via the AAS; the digital shadow processes incoming data traces, performs simulation and model updating, and exposes a dashboard for monitoring."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design (SysML structural and behavioral modeling), Development (implementation of Simulink simulation models and MQTT data ingestion), and Operational (continuous real‑time identification of friction during robot use). Manufacturing and validation phases are not explicitly covered in the document."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "White‑box analytical friction models combined with data‑driven black‑box models allow continuous parameter identification; simulation fidelity depends on accurate motor constants, gear ratios, and encoder precision; traceability of data generation ensures validation; uncertainties in friction due to wear, load, and temperature are addressed by real‑time data linking."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT communication between robot sensors and the digital shadow; data channels include motor current, encoder signals; optional Asset Administration Shell for semantic integration; processing component consumes these streams on a defined topic."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with SysML for system modeling, Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for data integration, and usage of established MBSE practices."
]
